title: Silver Snowflakes Christmas Mini Cracker Gift Boxes - Pack of 4
features: Approx size once assembled: 14cm x 6cm / 5.5 in x 2.5 in
description: Sold: Pack of 4 Approx size once assembled: 14cm x 6cm / 5.5 in x 2.5 in Material: Paper Assembly required. Please find below written instructions on how to build the Mini Cracker Gift Boxes. To start with, bend the cracker ends backwards, away from the label. Squeeze the top and bottom of the cracker, to form a rectangular tube. Place the cracker onto 1 end. Pinch all 4 of the corners together, one by one. Once this is done, you can grab two corners opposite each other and twist gently in an anti clockwise motion, apply a slight downward pressure. The creases should now allow the ends to naturally close, creating the traditional cracker end. Repeat the same process on the opposite end. These crackers can be opened and closed again once formed.
